scenarios.description: Load world state from JSON file - locations, citizens, schedules appear on map and lists
Save world state to JSON - valid re-loadable file produced
Edit citizen schedule events with time/location/activity, auto-calculates travel/spend/total
Edit location coordinates within 0-10000 range, map updates
Step button advances simulation time by 1 minute and updates citizen positions
Play/pause runs/stops simulation at approx 60 steps/sec
Travel/spend/total times auto-calculated based on 5km/h travel speed
Invalid schedule events (unreachable) highlighted and blocked from save
Citizen status label shows current activity/travel state
Activity text field (note-like) accepts free text for schedule event activity description
Schedule events ordered chronologically - ordinal ordering enforced
Location coordinate X/Y accept numerical values
Coordinate values validated 0-10000 range, error shown for out-of-range
Schedule event order syncs after time edits
Save blocked with error message for invalid schedule or duplicate location name
Full lifecycle: load world, edit citizen schedule, save, reload, verify persistence
Icon picker dismissable by clicking outside; cancel button discards unsaved changes
+ Add Event button visible and accessible in schedule editor header
Map canvas and simulation header remain stable during play
Schedule row clickable to enter edit mode, activity input visible
Save button saves citizen edits
Schedule events re-ordered automatically on time change
Focus remains stable after editing schedule fields
